history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle selfie of a young East Asian person with dark, tousled hair and clear skin. They are wearing a thick, black puffer jacket with the hood up, revealing the navy blue lining around the neck. The person's face is angled slightly, with sunlight casting a warm glow on the left side of their face, highlighting their nose and the left side of their forehead. Their lips are slightly parted and appear to have a reddish tint, possibly from lip balm or natural color. The background is softly blurred, showing hints of a car interior on the left and a plain, light-colored surface on the right, suggesting they are inside a vehicle. The lighting is natural and bright, creating soft shadows and a gentle, contemplative mood. The color palette is dominated by the dark tones of the jacket, contrasted with the soft skin tones and the muted background. The overall image has a candid and intimate feel.
